form_name: O2C - Order Management - Financial Flows and Cancellations

questions.text: What type of document is automatically created after the Post Goods Receipt for a return delivery?
Which document type is used for missing products in claims with physical movements?
What is the recommended method to handle returns with discrepancies between expected and received quantities?
options: Follow the configured workflow for returns
Use ZSOR and ZMIS order types

questions.text: What does the status "Rejected" indicate in the approval workflow for a sales order?
options: The order is ready for delivery
The order cannot be updated further and is marked complete

questions.text: What is the primary reason to use the "Manual PGR / GI" process for Missing/Surplus orders?
options: To adjust stock movements and complete order processing
To inspect material quality before posting goods
To track returns via workflow integration
